name: react-view-transitions
description: Implement CSS View Transitions API in Next.js App Router using next-view-transitions.

interface.longDescription: Implement CSS View Transitions API in Next.js App Router using next-view-transitions. Use when building page transitions, route animations, or the user mentions view transitions in a Next.js project.
